name: Vakko Tekstil ve Hazir Giyim Sanayi Isletmeleri A.S.
summary: Vakko Tekstil ve Hazir Giyim Sanayi Isletmeleri A.S. designs, manufactures, trades in, and retails ready-to-wear clothes for men and women under the Vakko brand. It offers shirts and ties, handkerchiefs, shoes and bags, monograms, scarves, and couture; home products; and perfumes, as well as wedding designer for women. The company also provides tea, pastries, ice cream, chocolates, and gift cards; organizes special events; and publishes magazines. In addition, it operates two Vakko Bistrot stores in Istanbul. It offers products through its stores, as well as online in Turkey. The company was founded in 1934 and is based in Istanbul, Turkey. Vakko Tekstil ve Hazir Giyim Sanayi Isletmeleri A.S. is a subsidiary of Vakko Holding A.S.
